llm_eval.notes: 実read。frontmatter健全: responsibility_id:R2-R3, owner_skill:run-system-dev-plan(実在, prompts/R2-decompose.md/R3-emit.mdが参照), source #C04実在, tools=Read,Write,Edit,Glob,Grep,Bash(python3 *)。責務はsingle feature goal-spec→P01..P13各1件のexact-13 package写像に限定, Layer2不変集合(phase ref=P01..P13, 全node共通parent/package)とLayer4禁止事項(14件目/cross-feature edge/後方edge/placeholder/absolute・traversal path)が明確。良い設計: 発見した独立責務をfollow-up feature candidateとして返しscope creepを回避, C12 validatorで自己評価。副作用安全: Write/EditをC09解決済current staging runに限定, Bashはpython3限定。Edit toolはstaging反復改善で正当。error-handling: 最大反復3・7項checklist(exact-13/1対1 inventory・graph/digest一致/前方edgeのみ/staging manifest digest保持)で停止判定可能。CI lintで機械被覆済のためmechanical:true。
